content.thinking:
The user wants to enable Prometheus scraping for CockroachDB metrics. Let me first understand the current state of the environment by checking what's running in the cluster.

Let me start by exploring the current state of the Kubernetes cluster to understand:
1. What CockroachDB resources exist
2. What Prometheus resources exist
3. What namespaces are available

Then I'll create the appropriate Prometheus Operator resources (ServiceMonitor or PodMonitor) to enable scraping.

content.text: Let me first survey the cluster to understand the current state of CockroachDB and Prometheus deployments.

input.command: kubectl get namespaces && echo "---" && kubectl get all -n monitoring 2>&1 | head -40
input.description: List namespaces and monitoring namespace resources

input.command: kubectl exec -n cockroachdb pod/crdb-cluster-0 -- curl -s http://localhost:8080/_status/vars 2>&1 | head -20
input.description: Verify CockroachDB metrics endpoint is accessible

content.content:
# HELP batch_requests_cross_region_bytes Total byte count of batch requests processed cross region when region\n		tiers are configured
# TYPE batch_requests_cross_region_bytes counter
batch_requests_cross_region_bytes{node_id="1"} 0
# HELP rocksdb_encryption_algorithm Algorithm in use for encryption-at-rest, see ccl/storageccl/engineccl/enginepbccl/key_registry.proto
# TYPE rocksdb_encryption_algorithm gauge
rocksdb_encryption_algorithm{store="1",node_id="1"} 0
# HELP jobs_schema_change_currently_idle Number of schema_change jobs currently considered Idle and can be freely shut down
# TYPE jobs_schema_change_currently_idle gauge
jobs_schema_change_currently_idle{node_id="1"} 0
# HELP admission_wait_queue_length_sql_root_start Length of wait queue
# TYPE admission_wait_queue_length_sql_root_start gauge
admission_wait_queue_length_sql_root_start{node_id="1"} 0
# HELP rpc_method_resolveintentrange_recv Number of ResolveIntentRange requests processed
# TYPE rpc_method_resolveintentrange_recv counter
rpc_method_resolveintentrange_recv{node_id="1"} 0
# HELP raft_transport_reverse_rcvd Messages received from the reverse direction of a stream.\n\nThese messages should be rare. They are mostly informational, and are not actual\nresponses to Raft messages. Responses are received over another stream.
# TYPE raft_transport_reverse_rcvd counter
raft_transport_reverse_rcvd{node_id="1"} 0
# HELP jobs_auto_update_sql_activity_fail_or_cancel_failed Number of auto_update_sql_activity jobs which failed with a non-retriable error on their failure or cancelation process
# TYPE jobs_auto_update_sql_activity_fail_or_cancel_failed counter
